name: obsidian-task-center
description: Task board with parent-child rendering, natural-language quick add, mobile gestures, and CLI commands for Tasks-style markdown.

scripts.test:unit: node --test test/parser.test.mjs test/writer.test.mjs test/cli.test.mjs test/quickadd.test.mjs test/cache.test.mjs test/i18n.test.mjs test/wdio-versions.test.mjs test/wdio-local-guard.test.mjs test/release-metadata.test.mjs test/task32-daily-folder.test.mjs test/source-dialog-api.test.mjs test/tags.test.mjs test/saved-views.test.mjs test/date-filter.test.mjs test/time-filter.test.mjs test/layout.test.mjs
scripts.version: node version-bump.mjs && git add manifest.json versions.json

author: CorrectRoadH
